# awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm (Resource)

Definition of AWS::CleanRoomsML::ConfiguredModelAlgorithm Resource Type



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `role_arn` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `inference_container_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--inference_container_config))
- `kms_key_arn` (String)
- `tags` (Attributes Set) An arbitrary set of tags (key-value pairs) for this cleanrooms-ml configured model algorithm. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `training_container_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--training_container_config))

### Read-Only

- `configured_model_algorithm_arn` (String)
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm.example
  identity = {
    configured_model_algorithm_arn = "configured_model_algorithm_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `configured_model_algorithm_arn` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm.example
  id = "configured_model_algorithm_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm.example "configured_model_algorithm_arn"
```
